chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1596 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 24.10.2016. None present for the petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith SIP Manzoor Ali on bhelaf of SSP Hyderabad. -.-.-. Today, learned A.A.G has filed statement on behalf of SSP Hyderabad (respondent No.2) wherein he has denied the allegation of harassment against the police officials and further undertook to provide legal protection whenever requested by the petitioner. Even otherwise, perusal of petition shows that intricate factual dispute is involved in it which cannot be resolved by this Court under its constitutional jurisdiction. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with the directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and to ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioner. JUDGE Ali Haider
